title: Companies House management information: April 2024 to March 2025
body: "These tables cover:   compliance rates for confirmation statements and annual accounts civil penalties for late filing of annual accounts prosecutions under the Companies Act 2006 prosecutions under The Scottish Partnerships (Register of People with Significant Control) Regulations 2017 disqualification orders notified to the Secretary of State in the UK the number of documents filed the percentage of documents filed electronically annual accounts registered by accounts type the number of times register data was accessed                Companies House management information April 2024 to March 2025    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 195 KB     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email enquiries@companieshouse.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                   Companies House management information April 2024 to March 2025    ODS, 73.6 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format  This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email enquiries@companieshouse.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.      Companies House has supplied these figures as management information. They are unaudited and may change.  We’ve sourced the figures from administrative systems. These systems are mainly designed for operational and financial purposes. They’re subject to the sources of error common in administrative systems. "
